subject: revised alex 2
body:
I am sending you this letter,   as a response to the
serious concern you had  raised, regarding  alleged
improper investigative conduct. To that end , I
immediately began an inquiry of our investigative
staff, and believe that the  contemporaneous notes
taken by our investigator, while attempting to
interview  Alexandra Hall, will provide the necessary
explanation for your thoroughly justified ,
consternation.. if not in fact providing in addition a
more troublesome, telling and ,unfortunately common,
example of her character.. To that end I also enclose 
examples of . her web site, where she, herself has
chosen to go by the quite unique nickname of ,"pimp
juice". and details her fascination with marijuana,,
This will come as no surprise to you as I'm sure you
are already  aware of her recent  palm beach arrest
for possession.  The following raw  notes, were taken
by investigators (one who suffers from a distinct
speech impediment , making impersonation virtually
impossible}who have  many years experience in
conducting interviews, who are also well versed in the
law , and  extremely sensitive to any potential
allegations of wrongdoing. They were instructed to
take her statement verbatim , as Alexandra , an
accomplished drama student,we believed would 
deliberately attempt to  mislead them ,as sucessfully
as she has misled others....they were instructed to
ask  detailed . questions  to further elucidate, her
previous pronouncements  regarding the no holds barred
,extreme lengths she would  go to, ,as she put it,"to
be  rich,,no I mean really,really rich". Even though
they were both well  prepared,and seasoned
investigators,   They were quite shocked at the 
overwhelming, non-stop  barrage  of profanity, being
hurled at them at a furious pace and volume, from what
initially appeared to be simply a young woman of
slight build and demeanor. Read for yourself...       
   insert transcript.   ....Our  other but, much less
likely alternative source, for the potential
misunderstanding,we beleive could be a close friend of
miss Hall's ,named ,Ashley Davis, who goes by the more
outlandish self chosen moniker and complete web name
of "Ashley Fucking Davis, "whose web pages I also
enclose.  I trust    this information is helpful to
you , as we all try       to bring this difficult
period to a close...                                  
                       





	
		
__________________________________ 
Yahoo! for Good - Make a difference this year. 
http://brand.yahoo.com/cybergivingweek2005/
